scenarios: 014-jolly-doctor-diagnostics.feature:Doctor validates the Saleor Cloud token, not just its presence
014-jolly-doctor-diagnostics.feature:Doctor reports a rejected Saleor Cloud token as warning, never pass
014-jolly-doctor-diagnostics.feature:Doctor warns when a per-store token is in the Cloud token slot
005-stripe-checkout-setup.feature:Jolly doctor warns when a live-mode Stripe secret key is configured
018-jolly-auth-commands.feature:Jolly login reads the token from a file with --token-file
018-jolly-auth-commands.feature:Jolly login reads the token from standard input with --token-stdin
018-jolly-auth-commands.feature:Jolly login reads the token from $JOLLY_SALEOR_CLOUD_TOKEN when no token flag is given
018-jolly-auth-commands.feature:--token-file takes precedence over the $JOLLY_SALEOR_CLOUD_TOKEN environment variable
018-jolly-auth-commands.feature:Jolly login --token-file with an empty file fails honestly and writes nothing
018-jolly-auth-commands.feature:Jolly login --token-file verifies the file's token against the Cloud API
018-jolly-auth-commands.feature:Jolly login warns that the OAuth callback listener is on the machine running Jolly
006-npx-cli-command-surface.feature:Every subcommand prints usage on --help instead of aborting
002-v1-end-to-end-saleor-cloud-storefront.feature:jolly start --dry-run skips store provisioning when a store endpoint is already configured
